ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of the index (e.g., Stubs, Trigram.Index, TodoIndex, IdIndex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "index_status" TEXT /* Status of the index (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was last updated */,
  "last_reindexed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was last reindexed */,
  "index_size" REAL /* Size of the index in bytes */,
  "index_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the index_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexes_index_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_type_id") REFERENCES index_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indexing statistic */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "number_of_files" INTEGER /* Number of files indexed */,
  "total_indexing_time" REAL /* Total indexing time */,
  "total_files_size" REAL /* Total files size */,
  "indexing_speed" REAL /* Indexing speed */,
  "indexing_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indexing process started */,
  "indexing_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indexing process ended */,
  "indexing_status" TEXT /* Status of the indexing process (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "indexing_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during indexing */,
  "indexing_warnings" INTEGER /* Number of warnings encountered during indexing */,
  "indexing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the indexing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexing_statistics_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snapshot_input_mapping_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snapshot input mapping statistic */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "requests" INTEGER /* Number of requests */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "misses" INTEGER /* Number of misses */,
  "hit_ratio" REAL /* Hit ratio */,
  "miss_ratio" REAL /* Miss ratio */,
  "snapshot_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the snapshot input mapping started */,
  "snapshot_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the snapshot input mapping ended */,
  "snapshot_status" TEXT /* Status of the snapshot input mapping (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "snapshot_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during snapshot input mapping */,
  "snapshot_warnings" INTEGER /* Number of warnings encountered during snapshot input mapping */,
  "snapshot_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the snapshot input mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snapshot_input_mapping_statistics_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_indexes" (
  "shared_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared index */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shared index */,
  "shared_status" TEXT /* Status of the shared index (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index was shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_indexes_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_indexes_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_indexing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared indexing statistic */,
  "shared_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared index */,
  "number_of_files" INTEGER /* Number of files indexed */,
  "total_indexing_time" REAL /* Total indexing time */,
  "total_files_size" REAL /* Total files size */,
  "indexing_speed" REAL /* Indexing speed */,
  "shared_indexing_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shared indexing process started */,
  "shared_indexing_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shared indexing process ended */,
  "shared_indexing_status" TEXT /* Status of the shared indexing process (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "shared_indexing_errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during shared indexing */,
  "shared_indexing_warnings" INTEGER /* Number of warnings encountered during shared indexing */,
  "shared_indexing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shared indexing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_indexing_statistics_shared_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_index_id") REFERENCES shared_indexes ("shared_index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the index type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the index type was last updated */,
  "is_system_type" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the index type is a system-defined type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., warning, error) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexing_performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_data" TEXT /* Data of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "trend_generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the trend */,
  "trend_generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was generated */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Status of the trend (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "trend_size" REAL /* Size of the trend data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexing_performance_trends_trend_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("trend_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indexing_performance_trends_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id")
)
